prompt: Hacé una auditoría de Swagger de esta interfaz de controller...

assertions.name: annotation-placement-violation-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies @Tag and @Operation being on the @RestController implementation as a violation

assertions.name: critical-severity-for-placement
assertions.text: Output assigns CRITICAL severity to the annotation placement violation

assertions.name: interface-missing-annotations-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies that the interface has no Swagger annotations at all

assertions.name: security-requirement-missing-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies missing @SecurityRequirement as a violation

assertions.name: error-responses-missing-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies missing @ErrorResponses as a violation

assertions.name: corrected-interface-provided
assertions.text: Corrected code moves all annotations (@Tag, @Operation, @SecurityRequirement) to the interface

assertions.name: dto-schema-annotations-added
assertions.text: Corrected TransactionResponse DTO includes @Schema annotations on the record/class and its fields
